PlayerPilot.settings.access.name: Player Pilot Access
PlayerPilot.settings.access.label: Configure Players
PlayerPilot.settings.access.hint: Choose which non-GM users should load the Player Pilot mobile interface.
PlayerPilot.settings.mode.name: Activation Mode
PlayerPilot.settings.mode.hint: Choose who sees the Player Pilot interface after logging in.
PlayerPilot.settings.noCanvas.name: Use No-Canvas Mode
PlayerPilot.settings.noCanvas.hint: For enabled players, ask Foundry to reload into no-canvas mode so mobile clients do less rendering.
PlayerPilot.settings.movementAuthority.h: Player-first tries direct token updates and falls back to the GM. GM-authoritative always routes movement through a connected GM.
PlayerPilot.settings.pingApproval.name: Ping Snapshot Approval
PlayerPilot.settings.pingApproval.hint: Manual asks the GM before sending a map snapshot. Auto sends it immediately.
PlayerPilot.settings.journalDuration.hin: How many seconds shared journal images stay visible for players.
PlayerPilot.settings.suppressAudio.name: Suppress Player Audio
PlayerPilot.settings.suppressAudio.hint: Mute local audio elements on enabled player clients so table audio stays controlled by the GM device.
PlayerPilot.settings.combatLock.name: Respect Combat Turns
PlayerPilot.settings.combatLock.hint: When enabled, players can use actions and move only when one of their owned tokens is the active combatant.
